summary: Completed testing of Admin Dashboard & Facebook Login features. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend integration tests successful: Facebook/Google buttons on Login/Register pages working, Admin Dashboard accessible by admin only, sidebar Admin link visible only for admin users.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed HTTPException handling in Facebook auth session endpoint - was being caught by generic Exception handler and returning 500 instead of 503
seed_data_creation: TEST_regular_user@test.com was created during backend tests to verify admin endpoint protection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard is fully functional. Facebook Login is implemented but requires FACEBOOK_APP_ID and FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET environment variables to be configured. The API returns 503 when these are not set.

facebook_login.notes: Button appears on Login/Register pages, API endpoint returns 503 (expected - no FACEBOOK_APP_ID configured)

admin_dashboard.notes: Accessible only by admin users, shows system stats, user management, IG accounts, proxies, recent searches

admin_access_control.notes: Non-admin users get 403 on admin endpoints, sidebar Admin link only visible to admin users, /admin page redirects non-admin to /dashboard
